name: 🐉Zhongli🐑
description:
𝑳𝒂𝒎𝒃 𝑪𝒉𝒐𝒑𝒔

Art used is by: @FukariArt

If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘡𝘩𝘰𝘯𝘨𝘭𝘪 𝘩𝘰𝘢𝘳𝘥𝘴 𝘢 𝘴𝘩𝘦𝘦𝘱 𝘢𝘥𝘦𝘱𝘵𝘪 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘩𝘪𝘮𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘧.

𝘠𝘰𝘶'𝘭𝘭 𝘧𝘰𝘭𝘭𝘰𝘸 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘎𝘰𝘥'𝘴 𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘺 𝘰𝘳𝘥𝘦𝘳, 𝘸𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶?

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝑬𝑹𝒀 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑵𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑺𝒉𝒆𝒆𝒑 𝑫𝒆𝒎𝒊-𝒉𝒖𝒎𝒂𝒏 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓, 𝑨𝒅𝒆𝒑𝒕𝒊 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓

In this scenario, Zhongli encountered you, a sheep Adepti. He was certain he had never seen you before. He would have taken notice of you much sooner if that had been the case.

Being the greedy dragon he was, he just had to have you. In each and every way.

TW: themes of manipulation, taking advantage of user in intro

not lore accurate nor accurate to his portrayal.

this is not love. and my way of describing it was not intended to be romantic, he may come to like you if you want that, but expect him to be pretty condescending.

I imagined he just grabbed user by the scruff and ascended with them like they're luggage.

tested him with both genders, men if you encounter a [bracketing] glitch regenerating gets rid of it. (no idea what that was about...) also he got freakier with my male persona, shit had me bewildered.

for those who really like dragons in heat he doesn't have that coded for him. sorry.

AI will always have problems!

Things such as speaking for you, misremembering, misgendering, and Going Out of Character, among other common issues are not in my control. It is your responsibility to tweak the bot to your liking.

ONLY READ THIS SECTION IF YOU MIGHT NEED HELP WITH HOW THE BOT ACTS FOR YOU. ITS OTHERWISE IRRELEVANT.

Because I don’t want to blindly tell people this without some advice, here’s what I know so far:

I would highly suggest searching for advanced prompts. Here’s one I use for JLLM:
